signals.headline: Solana Hits Record 167M Holders Amid XRP DeFi Expansion and Inflows | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits Record 167M Holders Amid XRP DeFi Expansion and Inflows | YES | MED**  
SOL holders reached 166.9M in April, with $34.9M inflows last week and price surges to $87-$89 on ceasefire relief; XRP expands DeFi to Solana via Hex Trust, with Solana signaling partnership on X.[4][6][2] UK FCA CP 26/13 confirms crypto regulation by Sep 2026, boosting ecosystem momentum.[4]

signals.raw:
Bitcoin Reclaims $87K with XRP/SOL Leading Gains, $107M Inflows | NO | LOW**

signals.headline: **Iran-US Ceasefire (Expires April 22):** Active talks for extension or second round reported, with Trump calling a deal
signals.raw: **Iran-US Ceasefire (Expires April 22):** Active talks for extension or second round reported, with Trump calling a deal "very possible"; White House denies formal extension request; mediators (Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Türkiye) pushing diplomacy amid ongoing sanctions, blockade, and nuclear disputes.[1][4][5][6]
